extortion.description: Fountains Condominium Operations Inc. is an in-house management company dedicated to ensuring the beauty, safety, and stability of the area, promoting neighborliness and pride among the residents, and forming a base for representation in matters affecting the community. This web site provides services to residents of Fountains of Palm Beach. If you need more information or have an issue to bring to our attention, please follow the links for our Board Members or other appropriate contacts contained herein.
